modal.title: New itinerary
modal.promptPlaceholder: E.g. 5 days in Prague, exploring Old Town and castles...

modal.controlsHint: Higher draft count or detail level may increase generation time.
modal.locationDenied: Location access was denied by the browser
modal.resumeNotAvailable: Your last generated drafts are no longer available.
modal.generatingHint: This may take up to 4 minutes
modal.generatingHint_gpt-3.5-turbo: This may take up to 3 minutes
modal.generatingHint_gpt-4o: This may take up to 4 minutes
modal.generatingHint_gpt-5.4: This may take up to 6 minutes
modal.checkNowHint: Checks whether AI has finished generating your itinerary. We also check automatically every 10 seconds.
modal.manualDatesRequired: Date from and Date to are required.
modal.manualDateRangeError: Date to must be the same as or later than Date from.
modal.manualDayCountLimitError: Manual itineraries can be up to {{count}} days.
modal.validationError: Please enter a prompt of at least 20 characters.
modal.conflictError: Generation already in progress. Please wait.
modal.timeoutError: Generation took too long. Please try again.

modal.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and retry.

springKyotoCulture.label: Spring in Kyoto (culture)
springKyotoCulture.prompt: 4 days in Kyoto in April. Focus on temples, traditional neighborhoods, and seasonal food. Keep pacing relaxed with one evening walk each day.

summerCroatiaSailing.label: Summer Croatia (sailing)
summerCroatiaSailing.prompt: 7-day summer trip in Croatia around late July, based in Split with island hopping by boat. Prioritize swimming spots, scenic coastlines, seafood, and one lively nightlife evening.

autumnScotlandRoadtrip.label: Autumn Scotland road trip
autumnScotlandRoadtrip.prompt: 6 days in Scotland in October as a road trip from Edinburgh through the Highlands. Include castles, short hikes, whisky tasting, and cozy local pubs.

winterDolomitesSki.label: Winter Dolomites (ski + wellness)
winterDolomitesSki.prompt: 5 days in the Italian Dolomites in January. Mix beginner-friendly skiing, mountain views, spa/wellness time, and two memorable dinner places.

verbosePeruAdventure.label: Peru adventure (verbose)
verbosePeruAdventure.prompt: I am planning a 12-day trip to Peru in early September and want a detailed itinerary that balances cultural depth, nature, and moderate adventure. Please include Lima, Cusco, Sacred Valley, and Machu Picchu, but also suggest one less touristy destination with strong local character. I would like practical pacing: no ultra-early starts every day, built-in rest windows, and realistic transfer times. Include highlights for food experiences, markets, photography spots, and short hikes (nothing extreme). I enjoy museums and history, but I also want street-level experiences such as neighborhood walks, local cafés, and evening viewpoints. Please organize days clearly and keep a thoughtful flow so acclimatization in altitude is handled safely.

eastAfricaSafari.label: East Africa safari (dry season)
eastAfricaSafari.prompt: 10-day East Africa trip in August focused on safari and wildlife photography, with Kenya + Tanzania highlights, sunrise game drives, one cultural village visit, and realistic transfer timing.

nepalHimalayaTrek.label: Nepal Himalaya trek + culture
nepalHimalayaTrek.prompt: 9 days in Nepal in November. Include Kathmandu heritage sites, a moderate mountain trek with great views (not extreme), local food experiences, and one rest day for recovery.

thailandCambodiaTemplesAndIslands.label: Thailand + Cambodia (temples + islands)
thailandCambodiaTemplesAndIslands.prompt: Two-week itinerary in February across Thailand and Cambodia: Bangkok, Siem Reap temples, then island time in southern Thailand. Blend history, street food, beaches, and two quieter days to avoid burnout.

japanGoldenRouteMixedPace.label: Japan golden route (mixed pace)
japanGoldenRouteMixedPace.prompt: 11 days in Japan during cherry blossom season with Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka, plus one smaller town stop. I want a mix of iconic sights, local neighborhoods, modern design spots, and memorable dining experiences.

australiaCoastAndNature.label: Australia coast + nature
australiaCoastAndNature.prompt: 14-day Australia plan in December: Sydney, Great Ocean Road, and Queensland coast. Prioritize coastal scenery, wildlife, easy hikes, and a couple of high-quality urban days for museums and restaurants.
